mapper.sql: id , conversation_id, sender_id, message_type, content, payload_json, reply_message_id, mention_all, mentioned_user_ids, send_status, revoke_status, revoked_by, revoked_at, client_message_id, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
select m.id, m.conversation_id as conversationId, m.sender_id as senderId, m.message_type as messageType, m.content, m.payload_json as payloadJson, m.reply_message_id as replyMessageId, m.client_message_id as clientMessageId, r.delivery_status as deliveryStatus, m.revoke_status as revokeStatus, r.read_at as readAt, m.created_at as createdAt, m.updated_at as updatedAt
order by m.id desc limit #{offset}, #{size}

select m.id, m.conversation_id as conversationId, m.sender_id as senderId, m.message_type as messageType, m.content, m.payload_json as payloadJson, m.reply_message_id as replyMessageId, m.client_message_id as clientMessageId, r.delivery_status as deliveryStatus, m.revoke_status as revokeStatus, r.read_at as readAt, m.created_at as createdAt, m.updated_at as updatedAt from chat_message m inner join chat_message_recipient r on r.message_id = m.id and r.recipient_user_id = #{userId} and r.visible_status = 1 where m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} and m.id = #{messageId} limit 1

select m.id, m.conversation_id as conversationId, m.sender_id as senderId, m.message_type as messageType, m.content, m.payload_json as payloadJson, m.reply_message_id as replyMessageId, m.client_message_id as clientMessageId, r.delivery_status as deliveryStatus, m.revoke_status as revokeStatus, r.read_at as readAt, m.created_at as createdAt, m.updated_at as updatedAt from chat_message m inner join chat_message_recipient r on r.message_id = m.id and r.recipient_user_id = #{userId} and r.visible_status = 1 where m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} and m.id in
#{messageId}
